name: evict_cache
promptSpec:
Process evict_cache(hits, size, ttl) -> (evict, refresh)

FSF specification:
if (ttl le 0) => evict eq 1 && refresh eq 0
if (hits ge 100 && size le 10) => evict eq 0 && refresh eq 1
if (hits ge 50 && ttl le 60) => evict eq 0 && refresh eq 1
if (size gt 50) => evict eq 1 && refresh eq 0
others => evict eq 0 && refresh eq 0

name: atm_withdraw
promptSpec:
Process atm_withdraw(balance, amount, pin_ok) -> (cash, status)

FSF specification:
if (pin_ok eq 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 2
if (amount gt balance) => cash eq 0 && status eq 3
if (amount gt 10) => cash eq 0 && status eq 4
if (amount gt 0 && amount le balance) => cash eq amount && status eq 1
others => cash eq 0 && status eq 0

externalProvenance.section: ATM withdraw process (Agile-SOFL / textbook banking pattern, scaled)

provenance.section: ATM withdraw process (Agile-SOFL / textbook banking pattern, scaled)

name: gate_wire_transfer
promptSpec:
Process gate_wire_transfer(amount, dest_risk, auth_level) -> (allow, hold)

FSF specification:
if (dest_risk ge 4) => allow eq 0 && hold eq 1
if (amount ge 15 && auth_level lt 3) => allow eq 0 && hold eq 1
if (amount ge 8 && auth_level ge 2) => allow eq 1 && hold eq 1
if (amount lt 8 && auth_level ge 1) => allow eq 1 && hold eq 0
others => allow eq 0 && hold eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Wire transfer compliance gate with overlapping amount/auth bands

provenance.section: Wire transfer compliance gate with overlapping amount/auth bands

name: dose_alert
promptSpec:
Process dose_alert(weight_kg, age, severity) -> (dose_u, alert)

FSF specification:
if (severity ge 4 && age lt 5) => dose_u eq 0 && alert eq 3
if (age lt 5 && weight_kg lt 8) => dose_u eq 1 && alert eq 2
if (age ge 12 && severity ge 3) => dose_u eq 4 && alert eq 1
if (weight_kg ge 10 && severity ge 1) => dose_u eq 2 && alert eq 0
others => dose_u eq 0 && alert eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Pediatric / adult dosage alert decision table (scaled kg/age)

provenance.section: Pediatric / adult dosage alert decision table (scaled kg/age)

name: limit_api_rate
promptSpec:
Process limit_api_rate(rps, burst, plan) -> (allow, retry_after)

FSF specification:
if (plan ge 3) => allow eq 1 && retry_after eq 0
if (rps gt 15 && burst gt 8) => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 10
if (rps gt 10 && plan ge 2) => allow eq 1 && retry_after eq 2
if (rps gt 10) => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 5
others => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 0

externalProvenance.section: API gateway rate limit with plan override

provenance.section: API gateway rate limit with plan override

name: library_renew
promptSpec:
Process library_renew(times_renewed, holds, overdue_d) -> (renewed, due_extend)

FSF specification:
if (holds ge 1) => renewed eq 0 && due_extend eq 0
if (overdue_d ge 3) => renewed eq 0 && due_extend eq 0
if (times_renewed ge 3) => renewed eq 0 && due_extend eq 0
if (times_renewed le 2 && overdue_d eq 0) => renewed eq 1 && due_extend eq 2
others => renewed eq 0 && due_extend eq 0

name: atm_withdraw_pilot

fsfScenarios.test: auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance

promptSpec:
Process atm_withdraw_pilot(auth, balance, amount) -> (cash, status)

FSF specification:
if (auth eq 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 2
if (amount le 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => cash eq 0 && status eq 1
if (auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance) => cash eq 1 && status eq 0
others => cash eq 0 && status eq 0

name: blood_pressure_cat
promptSpec:
Process blood_pressure_cat(systolic) -> (bp_cat)

FSF specification:
if (systolic ge 140) => bp_cat eq 4
if (systolic ge 130) => bp_cat eq 3
if (systolic ge 120) => bp_cat eq 2
if (systolic ge 90) => bp_cat eq 1
others => bp_cat eq 0

Important: evaluate conditions in listed order (top-down precedence).

name: heart_rate_zone
promptSpec:
Process heart_rate_zone(bpm) -> (zone)

FSF specification:
if (bpm ge 141) => zone eq 3
if (bpm ge 101) => zone eq 2
if (bpm ge 61) => zone eq 1
others => zone eq 0

Important: evaluate conditions in listed order (top-down precedence).

name: loan_risk
promptSpec:
Process loan_risk(credit_score,debt_ratio_pct) -> (risk)

FSF specification:
if (credit_score lt 580 && debt_ratio_pct ge 50) => risk eq 3
if (credit_score lt 670 && debt_ratio_pct ge 43) => risk eq 2
if (credit_score lt 740) => risk eq 1
others => risk eq 0

Important: evaluate conditions in listed order (top-down precedence).
